message:
chore(beads): update issue tracking for audit batches 311-320

Eight fresh-eyes audit batches (27 files, ~68,773 lines) all SOUND with zero bugs.
Covers: time/wheel, actor, hpack, trace/event, plan/analysis, runtime/builder,
observability/diagnostics, app, trace/geodesic, http/h2/connection, epoch,
plan/latency_algebra, h1/http_client, h3_native, raptorq/decoder, gf256,
link, decoding, distributed/bridge, channel/mpsc, combinator/bulkhead,
messaging/jetstream, types/budget, h1/types, lab/instrumented_future, types/wasm_abi.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
